data.name: RUMBLE BLAZING
data.detailed_description:
This game is a 3D fighting game for adults that includes sexual acts.
Please note that it contains very sexual content.

Use skills with various costumes and stages to aim for victory!

Grab your opponent and use techniques or destroy their costumes.
In the shop, you can purchase costumes, stages, and items that can be used during battles.

By purchasing a pass in the shop, you can use sexual techniques during battles or give your losers a H-punishment game.
In the shop, you can also find items that start with the H gauge full, or items that allow you to start a battle with items in your possession.

When the H gauge is full, you can use sexual techniques during a battle by deriving them from a grab technique or by using a sexual technique right away.

Simple customization is also possible, such as changing the hair color and skin color.

In the gallery mode, you can freely view techniques and H-techniques.

data.short_description: Sexy 3D fighting game for adults. You can grab your opponent, perform joint techniques, and perform sexually suggestive moves!
data.supported_languages:
日文*, 英文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows7
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Window10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7-3820 CPU @ 3.60GHz
  • 記憶體: 32 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Geforce GTX 1080
  • 儲存空間: 20 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows7
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Storage: 10 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Window10
  • Processor: Intel Core i7-3820 CPU @ 3.60GHz
  • Memory: 32 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Geforce GTX 1080
  • Storage: 20 GB available space
